openIssues.title: failed issue after merge checks red path
openIssues.body:
## 用户故事

作为 agent-loop 维护者，我希望 merge checks fail 的场景在 replay 中稳定呈现为 blocked human-needed path。

## Context

### Dependencies
```json
{"dependsOn":[]}
```

### AllowedFiles
- apps/agent-daemon/src/replay-eval.ts

### ForbiddenFiles
- apps/agent-daemon/src/daemon.ts

### MustPreserve
- replay remains local and deterministic

### OutOfScope
- live review or merge retries

### RequiredSemantics
- terminal linked PR blocks automated resume

### Validation
- `bun test apps/agent-daemon/src/replay-eval.test.ts`

## RED 测试

```ts
throw new Error('self-bootstrap checks fail fixture')
```

## 实现步骤
1. add replay fixture

## 验收
- [ ] blocked failure stays reproducible
